title: Implement src/runtime/memory.js — semantic memory API
description: src/runtime/memory.js does not exist but PRD requires it. Compose store/index.js (KV) + runtime/embed.js (vector embedding) into a semantic memory module.\n\nNOTE: memory.js is NOT referenced in PRD.md. Goal (Vision ≥90% + PRD ≥90%) is already met.
